{
  "candidate_id": "",
  "full_name": "MUHAMMAD ATHAR",
  "target_role": "RAN Planning Consultant",
  "location": "Bonn, Germany",
  "email": "athar.akh@gmail.com",
  "phone": "+49 174 7883277",
  "summary": "To hone my talent in a manner that they not only serve the best of the organization and employer, but are also in tandem with its policies and grows with the organization.",
  "skills": [
    "PRS",
    "ATOLL",
    "Pegaplan",
    "Pegabase",
    "U2000",
    "Tems Investigation",
    "Tems Pocket",
    "Actix Analyzer",
    "Mapino",
    "Project Management",
    "Adaptability",
    "Communication Skills",
    "Handling pressure",
    "Leadership Qualities",
    "Troubleshooter",
    "Good Communication Skills",
    "Keen observer and quick learner"
  ],
  "experience_years": 11,
  "work_experience": [
    {
      "job_title": "RAN Planning Consultant",
      "company": "ORBIT IT-Solutions",
      "location": "",
      "start_date": "Jan 2023",
      "end_date": "Present",
      "responsibilities": [
        "Evaluating site data design verification.",
        "Updating site data as per design documentation.",
        "Verification of site parameters as per Deutsche Telekom standard.",
        "Planning sites to satisfy coverage demands.",
        "Evaluating site design documents.",
        "Analysing coverage of planned sites to improve coverage and throughput estimations.",
        "Preparing project update report for customer discussion.",
        "Supported DT group by managing ATOLL database for the DT branches throughout Europe."
      ]
    },
    {
      "job_title": "2G/3G/LTE Planning/Optimization",
      "company": "Huawei Ufone Roll-Out/MBB Project/USF Projects",
      "location": "",
      "start_date": "Dec 2016",
      "end_date": "Nov 2022",
      "responsibilities": [
        "Carrying out weekly audit for analyzing project work.",
        "Performing 2G/3G/LTE parametric tuning for maintaining KPI above threshold.",
        "Hold meeting with customer for SSV/Project PAC submissions.",
        "Project progress reporting, time analysis, and final delivery report preparation.",
        "Responsible for planning 3G sector split activity, physical and parametric optimization.",
        "Performing initial 2G/3G/LTE optimization after launch.",
        "Managing database.",
        "Monitoring network performance KPI\u2019s and escalating performance issues.",
        "Performing worst cell analysis, and performing parametric tuning and physical changes to improve KPI\u2019s.",
        "Planning new 2G, 3G, and LTE sites.",
        "Performing NBR analysis, coverage analysis during planning."
      ]
    },
    {
      "job_title": "RNP/O 2G/3G/LTE",
      "company": "LCC (Mobilink Internal Project Huawei/ZTE)",
      "location": "",
      "start_date": "Aug 2015",
      "end_date": "Nov 2016",
      "responsibilities": [
        "Assisting team in generating KPI reports after changes in the network.",
        "Monitoring cluster worst cells for degradation, picking out top worst cells, and performing analysis and recommending changes in the particulars for improvement.",
        "Assisting team to keep database updated, and preparing tracker to be shared within team for smooth operation.",
        "Generating traffic report to be shared with the Sales/Marketing team.",
        "Responsible for generating Worst Cell reports in the assigned Cluster.",
        "Assisting team in generating traffic and availability reports to improve availability in the dense populated areas.",
        "Analyzing DT log-files for issues.",
        "Analysis of PAC reports submitted, and highlighting issues if found."
      ]
    },
    {
      "job_title": "RNO Engineer 2G and 3G",
      "company": "LCC (Mobilink Swap Project ZTE)",
      "location": "",
      "start_date": "March 2015",
      "end_date": "July 2015",
      "responsibilities": [
        "Performing physical changes after swap, to improve cells performance.",
        "Generating KPI reports of new swapped sites to be shared with the management.",
        "Performing KPI analysis of newly swapped sites for smooth operation.",
        "Preparing PAC report to be submitted to the operator for acceptance.",
        "Analysis of Cluster drive test after swap to evaluate Quality, Coverage, Throughput and Interference in the network.",
        "Analysis of initial drive-test Site level to identify Swap, low power TRX, Coverage/Quality issues, Low throughput issues.",
        "Responsible for making KPI Benchmark report for Customers approval.",
        "Analysis of Pre and Post Cluster Drive-Test data for evaluating results after swap in the network.",
        "Submitting PAC reports to the customer for approval.",
        "Responsible for Co-Ordination with the DT/BSS team during swap activities."
      ]
    },
    {
      "job_title": "RF Engineer 2G, 3G, and LTE",
      "company": "AircomIntl (Etisalat MS Project)",
      "location": "",
      "start_date": "Aug 2014",
      "end_date": "Feb 2015",
      "responsibilities": [
        "Monitoring dashboards for 3G/LTE KPI degradation, and reporting in case of any issues.",
        "Analyzing and processing data collected by drive-test team.",
        "Finding the poor coverage, Call drop, Call setup time, CSSR, CDR, HOSR, extract SQI, RxLev, RSCP, EcNo, CQI, RSRQ and RSRP samples.",
        "Analyzing LTE serving PCI\u2019s, Throughput on the cells.",
        "Analyzing RSRP and RSRQ for coverage monitoring.",
        "In-building LTE coverage issues and low throughput issues.",
        "Providing Indoor Coverage solutions for customers, and managing Walk-Test, and analyzing data for proper solutions.",
        "Using Mapinfo and Actix for reporting and analysis of data collected by DT Engineers of the walk-test.",
        "Using Actix, and Mapinfo for analyzing the drive test data for fault analysis.",
        "Analysis of Pilot Pollution on Actix, and proposing Neighbor modifications to resolve the issue."
      ]
    },
    {
      "job_title": "RF Engineer 2G and 3G",
      "company": "LCC (Huawei Roll-out Project)",
      "location": "",
      "start_date": "Jan 2012",
      "end_date": "Jul 2014",
      "responsibilities": [
        "Responsible for carrying out Site Surveys, for modernizing the physical parameters of the cell-site.",
        "Cluster Drive-Test Reporting, both before and after swap.",
        "Training new individuals to perform Drive-Test.",
        "Making Drive-Test analysis report.",
        "Collecting Drive-Test data.",
        "Analyzing the data recorded during the drive-test.",
        "Identifying reasons for handover failures.",
        "Cell dragging.",
        "Overshooting issues from other cell sites.",
        "Coverage issues.",
        "Bad quality on site.",
        "Interference from other cell sites.",
        "Dropped call reasons.",
        "Analyzing the log files and drive-test results.",
        "Performing Drive Test of new Roll-Out sites.",
        "Performing DT Reporting of the sites, analyzing issues, and proposing changes for their resolution.",
        "Performing HBA on different cell sites to reduce the interference issues in a cluster, and meet coverage requirements of the customer.",
        "Training new individuals to perform 2G/3G Drive-Test."
      ]
    },
    {
      "job_title": "Intern",
      "company": "Mobilink Operations Department (OAN)",
      "location": "",
      "start_date": "June 2010",
      "end_date": "August 2010",
      "responsibilities": [
        "Analyzing the working status of the equipment\u2019s installed on cell sites both Motorola and Alcatel.",
        "Using Site-Master for observing the current settings of the installed equipment.",
        "Making detailed reports of the issues resolved.",
        "Updating record of the alarms generated on the cell sites.",
        "Monitoring the alarms generated on the cell site.",
        "Alarms on radios.",
        "Power failure alarms."
      ]
    }
  ],
  "education": [
    {
      "degree": "BS Telecommunications",
      "institution": "FAST-NUCES",
      "year": "2011"
    },
    {
      "degree": "H.S.C. (Pre-Engineering)",
      "institution": "Bahria College Karsaz",
      "year": "2007"
    },
    {
      "degree": "S. S. C. Science",
      "institution": "Pakistan Islamia Higher Secondary School",
      "year": "2005"
    }
  ],
  "certifications": [],
  "languages": [],

}

{
  "job_id": "JOB-001",
  "title": "Senior RF Planning & Optimization Engineer",
  "company": "Nokia Solutions Germany GmbH",
  "location": "Bonn, Germany",
  "employment_type": "Full-Time",
  "remote_option": "Hybrid (3 days office / 2 days remote)",
  "description": "Nokia Solutions Germany is looking for an experienced Senior RF Planning & Optimization Engineer to join our Radio Access Network (RAN) team. The successful candidate will be responsible for planning, optimizing, and improving LTE and 5G mobile networks across Germany. The role involves close collaboration with cross-functional engineering teams to ensure excellent network performance, coverage, and customer experience.",
  "required_skills": [
    "LTE Radio Network Planning",
    "5G NR Optimization",
    "RF Planning",
    "Coverage Planning",
    "Capacity Planning",
    "KPI Analysis",
    "Drive Test Analysis",
    "Parameter Optimization",
    "Atoll",
    "TEMS Investigation",
    "MapInfo or QGIS",
    "Microsoft Excel",
    "Python",
    "SQL",
    "Report Writing",
    "Problem Solving"
  ],
  "preferred_skills": [
    "AI-assisted Network Optimization",
    "Automation using Python",
    "Machine Learning basics",
    "LangChain",
    "REST APIs",
    "Git",
    "Docker",
    "Cloud Fundamentals"
  ],
  "responsibilities": [
    "Perform RF planning and optimization for LTE and 5G networks.",
    "Analyze network KPIs and identify optimization opportunities.",
    "Conduct coverage and capacity planning.",
    "Perform parameter optimization for LTE and 5G cells.",
    "Analyze drive test and MDT data.",
    "Investigate interference and handover issues.",
    "Support new site rollout and modernization projects.",
    "Prepare technical reports and optimization recommendations.",
    "Collaborate with transmission, core network, and deployment teams.",
    "Support customer meetings and technical presentations."
  ],
  "qualifications": [
    "Bachelor's or Master's degree in Telecommunications Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or related field.",
    "Minimum 5 years of experience in RF Planning and Optimization.",
    "Experience with LTE, LTE-A, and 5G NR.",
    "Experience with Atoll planning tool.",
    "Experience with drive test analysis.",
    "Excellent analytical and communication skills.",
    "Fluent English.",
    "German language is considered an advantage."
  ],
